title: Payment Service Memory Leak
symptoms: High memory usage, slow response times, OOM errors in payment-service logs
root_cause: Memory leak in payment-service caused by unclosed database connections in the transaction handler
fix: Increased heap size to 4GB, added connection pooling with max 20 connections, implemented circuit breaker pattern

title: Nginx 502 Bad Gateway Spike
symptoms: Mass 502 errors in nginx logs, upstream connection refused, latency spike to 8000ms
root_cause: Upstream FastAPI workers exhausted due to a slow database query blocking all threads
fix: Added query timeout of 5s, increased worker count from 4 to 16, added slow query logging

title: Kubernetes Pod CrashLoopBackOff
symptoms: Pod restarting every 30 seconds, CrashLoopBackOff status, container exit code 137
root_cause: Container memory limit set too low at 256MB, application needed 600MB at peak load
fix: Increased memory limit to 1GB, added liveness probe with initialDelaySeconds 60

title: Database Connection Pool Exhaustion
symptoms: TimeoutError acquiring connection, queue full errors, all API endpoints returning 500
root_cause: Sudden traffic spike combined with a slow query in analytics service holding connections for 45+ seconds
fix: Killed long-running analytics queries, set query timeout to 10s, increased pool size from 10 to 50

title: Python Service Unhandled Exception Loop
symptoms: Repeated Traceback errors in logs, service degraded but not down, error rate 40%
root_cause: NullPointerException in user profile handler when optional field address was missing from request
fix: Added null check for optional fields, added global exception handler, improved input validation

title: Redis Cache Stampede
symptoms: Database CPU at 100%, Redis hit rate dropped to 5%, response times 10x normal
root_cause: Cache keys expired simultaneously at midnight causing all requests to hit database at once
fix: Added jitter to cache TTL values, implemented cache warming script before expiry

title: Disk Space Exhaustion on Log Server
symptoms: Services failing to write logs, disk usage at 100%, write errors across all services
root_cause: Log rotation policy misconfigured, debug logs accumulated for 60 days without cleanup
fix: Deleted old logs, set log rotation to 7 days, added disk usage alerting at 80% threshold

title: SSL Certificate Expiry Causing Auth Failures
symptoms: SSL handshake errors, authentication service returning 503, certificate expired errors
root_cause: SSL certificate for auth.internal expired, no automated renewal was configured
fix: Renewed certificate, configured auto-renewal with certbot, added 30-day expiry alert

title: API Rate Limit Causing Cascade Failure
symptoms: Third party API returning 429, internal service retrying aggressively, self-inflicted DDoS
root_cause: Retry logic had no exponential backoff, caused thundering herd against rate-limited external API
fix: Added exponential backoff with jitter, added circuit breaker, cached API responses for 60s

title: Docker Container OOM Killed
symptoms: Container suddenly stops, exit code 137 in Docker logs, no graceful shutdown
root_cause: ML model loaded entirely into memory during inference, exceeded container limit of 512MB
fix: Increased container memory to 2GB, implemented model lazy loading, added memory profiling

title: AWS S3 Timeout Causing Upload Failures
symptoms: File uploads timing out after 30s, S3 connection errors, users reporting failed uploads
root_cause: S3 bucket region mismatch causing cross-region latency, combined with large file sizes exceeding timeout
fix: Moved bucket to same region as application, implemented multipart upload for files over 5MB

title: CPU Spike from Infinite Loop in Worker
symptoms: CPU at 100% on worker node, all other services slowing down, worker unresponsive
root_cause: Infinite loop triggered in background job processor when message queue returned malformed payload
fix: Added payload validation before processing, added CPU usage alert at 85%, added job timeout of 60s

title: Elasticsearch Index Corruption
symptoms: Search returning 500 errors, index health showing red status, shard allocation failures
root_cause: Unexpected node restart during index write caused shard corruption on primary node
fix: Restored index from snapshot, enabled index replication factor 2, added snapshot policy every 6 hours

title: gRPC Service Deadline Exceeded
symptoms: gRPC calls returning DEADLINE_EXCEEDED, downstream services timing out, latency p99 at 15s
root_cause: Database index missing on frequently queried column causing full table scans on every gRPC call
fix: Added composite index on user_id and created_at columns, query time dropped from 12s to 50ms

title: Kafka Consumer Lag Spike
symptoms: Consumer lag growing to 500k messages, event processing delayed by 2 hours, downstream stale data
root_cause: Single consumer instance processing slow due to a downstream HTTP call with no timeout set
fix: Added 2s timeout to downstream HTTP calls, scaled consumer group from 1 to 6 instances

title: Load Balancer Health Check Failure
symptoms: Load balancer removing all backend instances, 503 errors for all users, health check failing
root_cause: Health check endpoint queried database on every call, database slowdown caused health checks to timeout
fix: Changed health check to lightweight ping endpoint with no database dependency, set timeout to 5s

title: JWT Token Expiry Causing Mass Logout
symptoms: All users logged out simultaneously, 401 errors across all services, auth service overwhelmed
root_cause: JWT secret key rotated without implementing graceful transition period, all existing tokens invalidated
fix: Implemented dual-key validation during rotation, added 24-hour transition window for old tokens

title: MongoDB Write Lock Contention
symptoms: Write operations queuing up, read latency spiking, MongoDB op queue growing
root_cause: Unindexed field used in update filter causing collection-level write lock on every update
fix: Added index on the filter field, rewrote bulk update to use updateMany with indexed fields

title: Microservice Circular Dependency Deadlock
symptoms: Two services hanging indefinitely, no errors in logs, requests never completing
root_cause: Service A called Service B while holding a lock, Service B tried to call Service A causing deadlock
fix: Broke circular dependency by introducing async event-based communication via message queue

title: DNS Resolution Failure in Kubernetes
symptoms: Internal service calls failing with connection refused, DNS lookup timeouts, CoreDNS errors
root_cause: CoreDNS pod OOMKilled due to DNS amplification from a misconfigured service discovery loop
fix: Restarted CoreDNS pods, increased CoreDNS memory limit, fixed service discovery loop in config

title: Python Celery Worker Starvation
symptoms: Tasks queued but not processing, worker processes idle, queue depth growing
root_cause: Long running task acquired all worker slots, short tasks had no workers available
fix: Configured separate queues for long and short tasks, set task time limit of 300s

title: Network Partition Between Availability Zones
symptoms: Services in AZ-B cannot reach services in AZ-A, split brain condition, data inconsistency
root_cause: Misconfigured security group rule blocked inter-AZ traffic after routine network update
fix: Corrected security group rules, implemented AZ-aware routing, added cross-AZ connectivity monitoring

title: Container Registry Pull Rate Limit
symptoms: Pod deployments failing, image pull errors, ErrImagePull status in Kubernetes
root_cause: Docker Hub pull rate limit hit due to all nodes pulling images anonymously without authentication
fix: Added Docker Hub credentials as Kubernetes secret, configured imagePullSecrets on all deployments

title: FastAPI Async Deadlock Under Load
symptoms: API freezing under load, requests hanging indefinitely, no timeout errors just silence
root_cause: Synchronous database call inside async FastAPI endpoint blocking the event loop
fix: Replaced sync db calls with async equivalents using asyncpg, added request timeout middleware

title: Prometheus Metrics Cardinality Explosion
symptoms: Prometheus memory usage growing rapidly, scraping timeouts, Grafana dashboards slow
root_cause: Developer added user_id as a metric label causing millions of unique time series
fix: Removed high cardinality labels, aggregated user metrics at application level before exposing

title: Cold Start Latency in Serverless Function
symptoms: First requests taking 8-10 seconds, users reporting slow initial load, timeout errors on cold starts
root_cause: Lambda function loading entire ML model on cold start, model size was 1.2GB
fix: Implemented model caching layer, reduced model size with quantization, added provisioned concurrency

title: RabbitMQ Queue Memory Alarm
symptoms: RabbitMQ blocking publishers, memory alarm triggered, messages not being consumed
root_cause: Consumer crashed silently, messages accumulated in queue for 6 hours before alarm triggered
fix: Added consumer health monitoring, set queue max length with dead letter exchange, added alerting

title: TLS Handshake Timeout Between Services
symptoms: Internal service calls failing with TLS handshake timeout, error rate 30%, latency spike
root_cause: mTLS certificate rotation left services with mismatched certificates during transition
fix: Implemented rolling certificate rotation with overlap period, added certificate expiry monitoring

title: Log Aggregation Pipeline Backpressure
symptoms: Logs delayed by 30 minutes, Logstash pipeline backed up, disk filling on log servers
root_cause: Elasticsearch indexing slow due to large number of dynamic fields causing mapping explosion
fix: Added explicit field mappings, disabled dynamic mapping, increased Logstash pipeline workers

title: GraphQL N+1 Query Problem
symptoms: GraphQL queries taking 20+ seconds, database connections exhausted, high CPU on DB server
root_cause: GraphQL resolver executing individual DB query for each item in list, 500 items = 500 queries
fix: Implemented DataLoader for batching, reduced 500 queries to 1, response time dropped to 200ms
